title: Overly Realistic Base Resources
description: Provides textures and resources for Overly-Realistic
body:
![OverlyRealistic Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7b90b75963f23a452cfcdb8f76c9a379523719c.png)

The **Overly Realistic Base Resources** pack is a resource pack that adds official textures and resources to the [Overly-Realistic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wilos-overly-realistic) project, as, by default, the project does not use its own custom textures/resources

This pack is meant to be used with Overly-Realistic and, as such, won't do much by itself!

![Some of the textures added by this resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c48b4c55e58a94f4b59eceef8f167a99cce43e18.png)
